arts.sum: The decisions has been slammed across Scottish football with the Hoops going on to lift the Premier Sports Cup

arts.ttl: 'He's so important' - Rodgers explains Taylor Celtic contract state of play
arts.sum: 'He's so important' - Brendan Rodgers explains Greg Taylor Celtic contract state of play.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers debunks Dermot Desmond Celtic 'myth' after transfer planning meeting
arts.sum: It is a meeting Rodgers and his staff have had many times before and without giving anything away about their planning, the boss revealed how important it is to meet with Desmond as he is “so entrenched” in everything being done at the club. So with the January transfer window just around the corner, Rodgers and the other Celtic higher-ups – Michael Nicholson and Chris McKay – all met with Desmond in Dublin to discuss plans for the next signing availability.

arts.ttl: Neil Lennon has his say on Kieran Tierney Celtic return potential
arts.sum: Kieran Tierney has been linked with a Celtic return Lennon was the boss to sanction Tierney to Arsenal for £25million back in 2019 so there is not many people out there more suited to speaking on his potential return to Glasgow next season.

Dundee United host Celtic in Scottish Premiership action for the first time since January 2023, as the two teams go toe-to-toe at Tannadice on Sunday at lunchtime. Dundee United lost three consecutiv...

arts.ttl: James Forrest ruled out for six weeks as Brendan Rodgers hints at Celtic missing other key stars
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers has delivered an update on his squad ahead of Celtic’s trip to face Dundee United this Sunday at Tannadice. Speaking in his pre-match press conference, Rodgers revealed Celtic veteran James Forrest has been sidelined for six weeks while Alistair Johnston is a doubt for the weekend.

arts.ttl: Preview: Dundee United vs. Celtic - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Scottish Premiership clash between Dundee United and Celtic, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers delivers update on Greg Taylor's Celtic contract status
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers has addressed Greg Taylor’s Celtic contract situation once again as his deal moves into its final few months at Parkhead. Brendan Rodgers hopeful over Greg Taylor Celtic situation
